description: A closed meeting packet should produce a final report draft with the expected executive summary language.

payload.draftExecutiveSummary: This meeting closed the release readiness review with concrete next steps.

decisions.title: Separate rollback readiness from the feature rollout
decisions.rationale: The team wants a smaller validation surface before resuming release work.

blockers.summary: Migration validation is still flaky in staging

openQuestions.question: Who signs off on the final rollback gate?

memoryHighlights.summary: A similar release issue appeared in a previous readiness review.
